documentation_changes_summary: Updated docs/features/forums.md to document the TopicLastActivity interface ({ author, at, isReply }) and resolveTopicLastActivity primitive introduced in the ST2 remediation pass. Fixed the existing resolveTopicLastActivityAuthors paragraph which incorrectly called it a 'shared primitive' — it is the ST2 wrapper that delegates to resolveTopicLastActivity and returns null for no-reply topics. Added TopicLastActivity field table and separate descriptions for the primitive (for ST3 consumption) and the wrapper (for listTopics/ST2).
final_test_outcomes: 174/174 unit tests pass; lint and typecheck clean (from tester artifacts).
